metadata.title: The model spells the word right inside even when you feed it the typo
metadata.topic: Latent error correction before any output is produced
metadata.purpose: The prior context ("make sure to") makes the intended word unambiguous; later layers fold that context into the misspelled token's vector, pushing it toward the correct token's direction, and the Jacobian lens traces the shift layer by layer.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro af_kore) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.still_lanes: c2v (misspelled token → corrected direction), raster (layer × rank), trace
metadata.prerequisites: lens readout, tokenization basics, residual stream
metadata.exclusions: attribution-graph-is-a-hypothesis (top-level carded), which heads perform the fix, subword-merge mechanics
metadata.visual_object: A rank-vs-layer descent curve for the correct word at the misspelled position — high, then dropping sharply to rank 1.
metadata.hook: Feed a sentence ending in a common misspelling, and the lens at that exact misspelled token already reads the correctly spelled word, layer by layer, before the model says anything.

beats.narration_text: Prompt ends "…make sure to recieve"; at the final fragment of "recieve" the lens ranks "receive" ~150th at layer 6, 8th at layer 14, 1st at layer 20 — while the surface token never changes.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: The residual stream at the typo starts from the typo's own embedding; if the model just used it, the lens should read the misspelling; why does the correct spelling climb to rank 1 mid-network?
Feed a sentence ending in a common misspelling, and the lens at that exact misspelled token already reads the correctly spelled word, layer by layer, before the model says anything.

The prior context ("make sure to") makes the intended word unambiguous; later layers fold that context into the misspelled token's vector, pushing it toward the correct token's direction, and the Jacobian lens traces the shift layer by layer.
beats.visual: A rank-vs-layer descent curve for the correct word at the misspelled position — high, then dropping sharply to rank 1.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: "Please make sure to recieve the package"; lens at "…ive": layer 4 rank 200, layer 10 rank 35, layer 18 rank 1 ("receive").

The prior context ("make sure to") makes the intended word unambiguous; later layers fold that context into the misspelled token's vector, pushing it toward the correct token's direction, and the Jacobian lens traces the shift layer by layer.
